name: NexRank
tagline: Full SEO suite. Rank tracking, keyword research, site audit, backlink analysis, competitor intel. All free, forever.
metaDescription: NexRank gives you enterprise-grade SEO tools for free. Track rankings, research keywords, audit your site, analyze backlinks, and spy on competitors. No credit card, no limits.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🔍</text></svg>

features.title: Rank Tracking
features.desc: Monitor your keyword positions daily across Google, Bing, and Yahoo. Track desktop and mobile rankings separately with historical trend data.

features.title: Keyword Research
features.desc: Discover high-value keywords with search volume, difficulty scores, CPC data, and SERP analysis. Find long-tail opportunities your competitors miss.

features.title: Site Audit
features.desc: Crawl your entire site to find technical SEO issues: broken links, missing meta tags, slow pages, duplicate content, and crawl errors.

features.title: Backlink Analysis
features.desc: See every link pointing to your site or your competitors. Analyze referring domains, anchor text distribution, and link quality scores.

features.title: Competitor Intelligence
features.desc: Spy on competitor traffic, top pages, keyword gaps, and ad strategies. See what's working for them and replicate it for free.

features.title: Content Optimization
features.desc: On-page SEO scoring for every URL. Get actionable recommendations for title tags, meta descriptions, headings, and content structure.

includes: Daily rank tracking for unlimited keywords
